r_space_frontier.prompt: Validate the first R-level slice and decide whether the first U witness task can start.

result.summary: R-level frontier contract is stable enough to open the first U witness task.

result.summary: Space gain witness contract is deterministic and can hand off to file lane review.

u_file_lane_contract.prompt: Review file lane witness boundaries and close the smoke workflow.

result.summary: File lane witness boundary accepted; smoke workflow complete.
